notes: Canada are without confirmed absentee Ismael Kone (broken leg, tournament-ending) and Alphonso Davies is a major doubt/rotation question after only returning off the bench vs South Africa — Marsch has not confirmed a starting role for him. Morocco are close to full strength with defender Chadi Riad a minor fitness concern, though Ouahbi is expected to have a fully-fit squad; pre-tournament losses of Nayef Aguerd (groin surgery) and Abde Ezzalzouli (knee) were already absorbed in earlier rounds.

Tani Oluwaseyi (rotation striker, in contention to start alongside David)
